title: VimFu — gg Go to Top
description: gg jumps to the first line of the file. With a count, Ngg jumps to line N. The complement of G (go to bottom).

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

steps.say: G G jumps to the first line of the file. Shift G goes to the last line. G G goes to the first.

steps.comment: --- Demo 1: go to bottom, then gg ---

steps.say: Shift G to go to the last line.
Now G G to jump back to line one.
Back at the top. Line one.
With a count, G G goes to that line number. Twenty two G G.
Line twenty two. The Fleet class.
Line ten. Same as ten G, just a different style.
G G with no count always goes to line one.
G G. Jump to the top. Shift G for the bottom, G G for the top. Add a count to go to any line.
